title: Funny Birthday Card for Mom
meta_desc: Send a funny birthday card to mom with our free online greeting card. Personalize, share, and download HD.
message: Happy Birthday Mom! You're not old, you're vintage. And everyone knows vintage is priceless. Love you!

title: Funny Birthday Card for Dad
meta_desc: Send a funny birthday card to dad for free. Personalize with your own message and download HD.
message: Happy Birthday Dad! Thanks for teaching me everything I know. Well, almost everything. Some things YouTube taught me.

title: Sweet Anniversary Card for Husband
meta_desc: Send a sweet anniversary card to your husband with our free online greeting card. Romantic, personalized, and HD.
message: Another year around the sun together. Thank you for every laugh, every hug, and every adventure. I love you more each day.
